ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the province */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the province */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the provincial health department */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (population per square kilometer) */,
  "vaccination_coverage_rate" REAL /* Overall vaccination coverage rate for the province */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 18-34) */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Starting age of the age group */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* Ending age of the age group */,
  "vaccination_coverage_rate" REAL /* Vaccination coverage rate for the age group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Female, Male) */,
  "vaccination_coverage_rate" REAL /* Vaccination coverage rate for the sex */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination data entry */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals vaccinated */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the demographic group */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination data entry */,
  "vaccination_coverage_rate" REAL /* Vaccination coverage rate for the demographic group */,
  "vaccination_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the vaccination data */,
  "vaccination_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of vaccine administered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_vaccination_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_source_id") REFERENCES vaccination_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_vaccination_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_type_id") REFERENCES vaccination_types ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Health Department, Survey) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_types" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "doses_required" INTEGER /* Number of doses required for full vaccination */,
  "storage_requirements" TEXT /* Storage requirements for the vaccine */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the vaccine */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination data entry */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine type */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number of the vaccine administered */,
  "vaccination_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination center */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual who was vaccinated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_vaccination_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_center_id") REFERENCES vaccination_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES campaign_participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccination_types ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination outcome */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination record */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., Adverse Reaction, Effective) */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the outcome (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "follow_up_required" TEXT /* Indicates if follow-up is required (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_outcomes_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES vaccination_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_population" INTEGER /* Target population for the campaign */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine type used in the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the campaign */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_campaigns_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccination_types ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign participant */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination campaign */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination data entry */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "participant_age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "participant_sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant's sex */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the participant (e.g., Fully Vaccinated, Partially Vaccinated) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_participants_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES vaccination_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_participants_participant_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_participants_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign outcome */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination campaign */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., Success, Partial Success, Failure) */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred in the campaign */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_outcomes_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES vaccination_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province where the center is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the vaccination center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vaccination center (number of people it can handle per day) */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the center */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_centers_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)
